title: Bump 1.7-dev
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

Bump upstream version to 1.7-dev.  DO NOT MERGE until #1283 has merged and @rhatdan gives the OK for any kit fun.

comments.body: :umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably 66ff1dd) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
Looks like I need a rebase, will hop on it.
